content.method: Use the study or pilot design stated in the migrated v1 research agenda.
content.question: A process-tracing case study of how similar advisory frameworks (e.g. EU pay-conditionality benchmarks, prior Hungarian education indicators) have actually been used in real decisions over a multi-year period, to test S5's risk of selective political use.
content.why_it_matters: It can change the comparison of transformation choices.
